$comment: Authoritative build-time configuration for flow-gen. Model tiers map to whatever the active runtime understands: for the LiteLLM->Bedrock path use your `model_list` names (e.g. flow-haiku); for plain Claude Code use its native size aliases (haiku/sonnet/opus) or `inherit`. Edit the right-hand values and re-run `npm run gen`.

environment.note: FLOW provides its own orchestration. It does not depend on Claude Code Dynamic Workflows or Agent Teams. See docs/flow/DECISION-GUIDE.md and CONTEXT.md.

modelTiers.$comment: left = FLOW canonical tier; right = the model name the runtime resolves. Set to native Claude Code size aliases for local use; swap to LiteLLM model_list names (flow-haiku/flow-sonnet/flow-opus) when routing through the gateway.

copilot.$note: Copilot CLI ignores .github/prompts/. IDE chat (VS Code / JetBrains) is first-class; CLI is degraded and gets the workflow only via injected copilot-instructions.md.
